SELECT DISTINCT  ?firstChampYear ?anyChamp ?arena
WHERE
  { FILTER ( ( ( ! isLiteral(?arena) ) || ( lang(?arena) = "" ) ) || langMatches(lang(?arena), "en") )
    FILTER ( ( ( ! isLiteral(?firstChampYear) ) || ( lang(?firstChampYear) = "" ) ) || langMatches(lang(?firstChampYear), "en") )
    FILTER ( ( ( ! isLiteral(?anyChamp) ) || ( lang(?anyChamp) = "" ) ) || langMatches(lang(?anyChamp), "en") )
    <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/m.0jmfb>

    ?anyChamp  <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/time.event.start_date>  ?anyChampDate
    BIND(substr(str(?anyChampDate), 1, 4) AS ?anyChampYear)
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?firstChampYear
      WHERE
        { <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/m.0jmfb>
                    <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/sports.sports_team.championships>  ?firstChamp .
          ?firstChamp  <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/time.event.start_date>  ?firstChampDate
          BIND(substr(str(?firstChampDate), 1, 4) AS ?firstChampYear)
        }
      ORDER BY xsd:dateTime(?firstChampDate)
      LIMIT   1
    }
    <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/m.0jmfb>
              <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/sports.sports_team.arena_stadium>  ?arena
  }
LIMIT   1
